manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to describe a target word for another player to guess.

Rules:
(a) You have to reply in the form: CLUE: <some text>. Guesses from the other player will start with GUESS.
(b) You cannot use the target word itself, parts or morphological variants of it in your description.
(c) In addition, the same rules apply for related words which are provided below.

End conditions:
(i) If you use the target word or a related word in your description, then you lose.
(ii) If the other player can guess the target word in 3 tries, you both win.

Let us start.

This is the target word that you need to describe and that the other player needs to guess:

spoon

Related words are:

- eating
- dinner
- bowl

Important: You are under time pressure, give short descriptions that are to the point!

message.content:
<thought>**Let's Crack This Word!**

Okay, the target word is "spoon," and I have three tries to get the other player to guess it. The forbidden words are "eating," "dinner," and "bowl," which is a bit limiting, but I can work with it.

First, I need to list some characteristics: It's a utensil, obviously. I can use it for soup, yogurt, cereal... It's also part of the silverware/cutlery set, with an oval or round head and a handle. It pairs with a fork and knife, and I can use it to stir sugar into coffee.

I need to avoid the forbidden words. "Eating" is a no-go. "Dinner" is out. And I can't say "bowl," even though it's so closely related.

Time for some actual clues! Okay, first idea: "A utensil used for soup or cereal." Safe enough. Second: "Silverware for scooping liquids." Also good. Third: "Part of a cutlery set with a fork and knife, used for yogurt." I think this is a really strong clue as it's descriptive and distinct.

Alright, I think I'll go with: **"CLUE: Utensil used for soup and cereal."** This avoids all the banned words and should be clear enough. Let's hope it works!


</thought>CLUE: Utensil used for soup and cereal.

clem_player.response: CLUE: Utensil used for soup and cereal.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to guess a target word that another player describes to you.

You can make one guess at each trial. You win when you guess the target word. You lose when you cannot guess it in 3 tries.

After each trial you will get a new hint from the other player which starts with CLUE.

Make your guesses by just saying the word using the following form: GUESS: <a word>

Let us start.


CLUE: Utensil used for soup and cereal.

Therefore, the target word has to be "Spoon."  So, in the correct format, that's `GUESS: Spoon`.  Let's submit it and see if I'm right.
